center.name: Alexander Wetmore
center.summary: Alexander Wetmore是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括灰鳳冠雉、Puerto Rican nightjar，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Puerto Rican nightjar, Puerto Rican whip-poor-will or guabairo (Antrostomus noctitherus) is a bird in the nightjar family found in the coastal dry scrub forests in localized areas of southwestern Puerto Rico

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: right|thumb|Peggy, the Northern Helmeted Curassow at the Denver Zoo, USA The helmeted curassow (Pauxi pauxi) or northern helmeted curassow, is a large terrestrial bird in the family Cracidae found in the subtropical cloud-forest in steep, mountainous regions of western Venezuela and northern Colombia
